title: Apply biosecurity measures
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply biosecurity measures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify biosecurity threats and determine control measures for site
